summary: A truck is stopped on a residential street with its brake lights illuminated. Two individuals are standing beside the truck on the right side of the road, seemingly inspecting something. A tram passes by on the left side of the road, while a silver sedan drives past in the opposite direction.

events_timeline.event: The truck is stationary with its brake lights on, indicating it has halted.
Two pedestrians are standing next to the truck, possibly assessing an issue.
A tram travels along the left side of the road.
A silver sedan moves across the road from left to right.

uncertainties: The identities and actions of the two individuals beside the truck are unclear.
Whether the truck's brake lights illuminate due to braking or another reason cannot be definitively determined.

risk_assessment.why: There are no visible collisions, near misses, or hazardous interactions between vehicles or pedestrians.
